description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to package mc_rtc that triggers on repository dispatches of types package-master and package-release, on pull requests to any branch, and on push events to any branch with a tag matching v*, excluding certain paths. The workflow uses a reusable workflow from jrl-umi3218/github-actions to package the project with specified dependencies, ROS integration, and the latest CMake. It also passes secrets for Cloudsmith and GitHub Pages.
